nodes.name: Psilopogon
nodes.summary: Psilopogon（Psilopogon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联33种鸟类，如Malabar barbet、Crimson-fronted barbet、赤胸拟啄木鸟等33种鸟类。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-banded barbet
nodes.summary: The black-banded barbet (Psilopogon javensis) is a bird species in the Megalaimidae family. It is endemic to Java and Bali. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. They are known to attract ecotourists to Java. References
nodes.shortSummary: The black-banded barbet (Psilopogon javensis) is a bird species in the Megalaimidae family. It is endemic to Java and Bali.

nodes.name: Black-banded barbet
